description: High-level campaign order for writers — mirrors Unity WorldMapManager MVP linear vision + optional lanes. Not a runtime quest graph yet.

vision_0_fair_field_arc.title: Vision I — Malvern, Tower, Fair Field, dungeon, Piers, sins

vision_2_do_wel_arc.title: Vision II — Do-Wel, depths, years, Field of Grace

orfeo_alternate_lane.title: Sir Orfeo / boundary — into Otherworld
orfeo_alternate_lane.notes: boundary_tree also returns to fayre_felde in Unity MVP; otherworld is terminal.

green_chapel_lane.title: Sir Gawain optional
green_chapel_lane.notes: Enters from fayre_felde; exits back to fayre_felde.
